detail.name: Fixed Rate Home Loan
detail.description: Lock in a little certainty with a fixed interest rate for 1-5 years

features.additionalInfo: Flexible repayments : Choose to make your repayments weekly, fortnightly or monthly
Lock in a fixed rate - Lock in your fixed rate when you apply, so if rates rise before you settle, you won?t be affected (fees apply).
Interest in advance : Choose to pay interest in advance on investment loans and get 0.2% p.a. off the fixed interest rate for the interest in advance period.

features.additionalValue: Advantage Package Option and save : With a St. George Advantage Package, you can get discounted interest rates and fees when you package your home loan, credit card and transaction account. An annual package fee of $395 applies.

features.additionalInfo: Family Pledge : Use the equity in a family member's home to help you on your home buying journey and maximise the amount you can borrow.
At the end of your fixed rate period, choose to re-fix your interest rate for another fixed rate period or let it revert automatically to our standard variable interest rate

For loans fixed from 17 May 2020: During a fixed rate period, customers can only redraw available funds that have been paid into the loan during the fixed rate period, up to the prepayment threshold. The prepayment threshold is $30,000.For loans fixed before 17 May 2020: During the fixed rate period, customers can only redraw up to $10,000 in each 12-month period (anniversary year)
Option to Loan Split/Subsequent Loan Sequence
The product includes a combination loan feature.
The product provides options which includes reduced repayment, repayment holiday and portability features
The product includes a Relocation Loan End Debt feature
The product includes Switching (from another product) feature
Loan Payment Method - Direct Credit, Direct Debit (preferred), Branch Payment, Internet or Phone Banking

Substituting a security : You may ask us to accept a new mortgage over other land as a substitute for any mortgage which is security for your loan. We may agree to this if you satisfy any reasonable requirements that we have, such as repaying part of the loan amount. We will require the new mortgage to be provided at the same time that the existing mortgage is discharged. We charge a fee for substituting a mortgage or other security.
Statements of account : We will send you a statement of your loan account at least every six months or more frequently if you request

Complete your refinance loan application with FASTRefi. A faster and easier refinancing process compared to the standard way - so you could access your new Bank of Melbourne home loan in days, as opposed to weeks. Eligibility applies.
Cancellation of the package : A package owner may cancel the package at any time by giving us 14 days advance notice in writing.
Subject to terms and conditions, this product includes extra repayment features.
The product includes fraud protection features.
Subject to terms and conditions, this product includes guarantor features.
Relationship management is available for eligible customers.

constraints.additionalInfo: Owner occupier - Loan maximum interest only period 5 years
Investment - Loan maximum interest only period 10 years

eligibility.additionalInfo: Applicant should be 18 years or over

eligibility.additionalValue: Should be an Australian or New Zealand citizen(s) or permanent resident(s)

eligibility.additionalInfo: Individuals, Trusts (individual and company trustees), Company, Partnership

discounts.description: This fee is waived for Customers that have Premier Advantage Package (other fees apply)
This fee is waived for Customers that have Premier Advantage Package (other fees apply)

fees.name: Document Processing Fee
fees.additionalInfo: The Settlement Processing Fee, is a fee charged as apart of the fees for Loan Establishment. It is the fee charged for the processing of settlement services. These can include document validation, value transaction processing and, conveyancing activities required for mortgage lending settlements.

fees.name: Property Valuer Fee
fees.additionalInfo: The Fee starts from $ 164 and the amount payable is dependent on location/value of security property(is)

fees.name: Missed Payment Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Fee payable when we send customer an arrears letter relating to an overdue amount

fees.name: Lenders Mortgage Insurance Premium
fees.additionalInfo: If your deposit is less than 20% then Lenders Mortgage Insurance is usually required. There may be other circumstances where Lenders Mortgage Insurance is also required. As Lenders Mortgage Insurance reduces bank's risk as a lender when providing a home loan, you may be able to apply for a home loan and get into your home sooner, with a lower deposit. Lenders Mortgage Insurance insures bank for any shortfall in the event that you default on your loan and if the proceeds from the property sale are not enough to pay off the loan in full. The cost of Lenders Mortgage Insurance is calculated as a percentage of the loan amount. The percentage applied will vary depending on a number of factors. Please speak to your lender if you would like to understand this process in more detail. The cost of Lenders Mortgage Insurance premium is passed on to you. We do not receive a commission on Lenders Mortgage Insurance.

fees.name: Break Cost fee
fees.additionalInfo: Break costs are an amount equal to the Bank's reasonable estimate of its loss due to breaking of the fixed rate period or early repayment of a fixed rate loan.

fees.name: Fixed Rate - Lock-In Fee
fees.additionalInfo: With the Rate Lock feature, you can lock in the current fixed interest rate. This way, for a fee, you are protected from the possibility of rising interest rates. If the current rate falls below your 'locked in? rate on your settlement date, you'll be given the lower rate. Rate Lock will hold the current fixed rate for up to 90 days after you have locked in the rate for a fee of 0.15% of the loan amount (minimum fee amount $500, maximum charge is capped at $1,000 for loans up to $2M, and 0.15% of the loan amount for loan above $2M)

lendingRates.additionalInfo: The rates include our 0.10% p.a. discount for LVRs+ up to 70%. For Government's home guarantee scheme-backed loans, maximum LVR may differ.
Our standard interest rate applies if you're borrowing above 70% and up to 80% of our property valuation. For Government's home guarantee scheme-backed loans, maximum LVR may differ.

An extra 0.30% p.a. will be applied on top of our standard interest rate if you?re borrowing above 80% of our property valuation. For Government's home guarantee scheme-backed loans, maximum LVR may differ.
